title: cyphostemma manikense
intro: Cyphostemma manikense is a plant species that belongs to the grape family (Vitaceae) and is native to Kenya. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cyphostemma manikense include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, which can also be used in combination with other herbs to create tonics and remedies for various health conditions.
